scores.correctness_notes: The priority order is wrong: the agent lists WaitingStatus above MaintenanceStatus, but the correct order (per gold standard) is error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active. The agent also omits the important note that calling add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error. The rest of the pattern is correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: The stated priority order (Blocked > Waiting > Maintenance > Active) inverts the relative positions of Waiting and Maintenance — the actual priority is Maintenance above Waiting. This is a factual inaccuracy rather than a fabricated API, warranting score 1.
